visual: Data Tables (Numeric Display). "Books Read This Month" — Fiction=40, Nonfiction=60, Comics=20, Poetry=30. Horizontal layout.
visual_2: Bar Graphs (Mode 2: Creating). Vertical. Scale of 10, axis 0–70. 3 of 4 bars pre-filled: Fiction=40, Comics=20, Poetry=30. Nonfiction bar empty. Ghost gridlines at 10s visible. Snap-to-10 enabled. Click-to-set.
guide: "Nonfiction has 60 books. That's the biggest number. Set the bar for Nonfiction."
prompt: "Set the bar for Nonfiction to show 60."
on_correct: "Nonfiction at 60. You found the 60 line and set the bar there."
remediation_light: "Find where 60 is. Set the bar to end at that line."
